overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic survival game showing a character exploring a rustic wooden settlement at night. The character walks through a camp with shacks, campfires, and NPCs, carrying a rifle and crossbow on their back while the camera follows smoothly behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden supply shelter at base of hill

events.description: character leaves the covered wooden shelter and begins ascending the dirt hill

agents.ego_description: walking away from a wooden supply shack and climbing up a dirt incline into the open settlement area

entered.detail: small wooden supply shack with open front and red metal shelving units inside
steep dirt incline leading up into the main settlement area
tall evergreen trees surrounding the settlement on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a small wooden supply shelter where the character starts moving uphill along a dirt path. The area is dimly lit with blue moonlight filtering through the trees as the character leaves the sheltered area and ascends into the open settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer settlement with scattered wooden shacks

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate between wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the outer camp area past wooden cabins and a parked white van, surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: rustic wooden shack with sloped roof and small windows
abandoned white delivery truck parked near the cabins
dark mountain peaks silhouetted against the night sky in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the outer edges of the settlement, passing wooden cabins and an abandoned white van. The terrain opens up revealing distant mountain peaks against the dark sky, with camp lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded path with fencing leading to inner camp

events.description: path becomes more enclosed by trees and wooden fencing as character approaches inner camp

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and dense pine trees, heading toward the main camp area

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fencing lining the dirt path
dense cluster of tall pine trees creating dark shadows along the path

segments.scene_description: The character follows a winding dirt path that becomes more enclosed by dense pine forest and wooden fencing. The environment transitions from open settlement to a more wooded corridor as the character approaches the inner camp facilities.

scene_state.functional_zone: main camp mechanic area with workshops

events.description: character enters the main camp area with visible NPCs and lit workshop structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the active camp area past the mechanic shop where NPCs are working, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: mechanic standing near the workshop entrance working on equipment

entered.detail: wooden workshop structure with green tarp canopy and illuminated work lights
several parked motorcycles and bikes lined up near the mechanic shop
green canvas canopy stretched over wooden poles providing shelter

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main camp hub where artificial lighting illuminates a mechanic shop with parked motorcycles. An NPC mechanic is visible working near the entrance as the character walks past the green tarp canopies and workshop areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp plaza with bounty board and gallows

events.description: character approaches the central plaza with the illuminated bounty board becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward the center of camp past the bounty board and approaching the wooden gallows structure

entered.detail: illuminated wooden sign with 'BOUNTIES' text and red graphics showing wanted posters
tall wooden gallows structure with crossbeam and ladder in the central plaza
white wooden church-like building with steeple visible behind the gallows

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the central plaza of the settlement where an illuminated bounty board stands prominently on the left. In the distance, a wooden gallows structure and white church building are visible against the mountain backdrop as the character continues walking through the camp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded wooden shelter through the outskirts of a rustic settlement and into its illuminated central hub. It begins by ascending a dirt path under dim blue moonlight, leaving a small supply shelter to move through the settlement's outer edges past wooden cabins and an abandoned white van. As the terrain opens to reveal distant mountain peaks, the path winds back into a wooded corridor enclosed by dense pine forests and wooden fencing. The scene then shifts into the main camp hub, where artificial lighting illuminates a mechanic shop with parked motorcycles and green tarp canopies. Finally, the camera reaches the central plaza, passing an illuminated bounty board while a wooden gallows and a white church stand against the dark mountain backdrop.
